ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., active, closed, draft) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the survey */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is mandatory */,
  "options" TEXT /* Possible options for multiple-choice questions */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response is for */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response is part of */,
  "gender_identity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent's gender identity */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population category */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household type */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of respondents for this response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was submitted */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight applied to the response for statistical analysis */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the response (e.g., validated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_household_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_type_id") REFERENCES household_types ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_gender_identity_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_identity_id") REFERENCES gender_identities ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_identities" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender identity */,
  "gender_identity" TEXT /* Name of the gender identity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender identity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population category */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_types" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household type */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Name of the household type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the check is for */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of check performed */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the check */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the check */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed notes or comments on the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaboration group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group's purpose */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the group was created */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user of the group */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the group (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_groups_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaboration group */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the group */,
  "role_in_group" TEXT /* Role of the user within the group (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES collaboration_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
